creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
This patchfile will upgrade the port from version 4.2 to version 4.4,
plus it will enable shared library use for ELF (in the current state the
port uses the *static* library for ELF !!). Some comments:

   * Removed Steve's URL from MASTER_SITES
   * Introduced a new scheme for shared library naming & versioning
   * Make use of bsd.port.{pre,post}.mk (already in the CVS tree)
   * Add SIZE info to files/md5 (in expectation of SIZE checking in the
     fetch target)
   * Tweaked the patches to build the shared version of the c-client
     library (will build correctly both under AOUT & ELF architectures)
     It seems that the new ELF ld/binutils need a libfoo.so link (they
     won't look for libfoo.so.M), so under ELF the current port would 
     have built static compiled binaries (that's why jseger needed the
     c-client.a -> libc-client.a change)
   * Some minor modifications for pkg/{COMMENT,DESCR}
   * Tweaked the PLIST to make use of ${SHLIB*} naming/versioning, fixed
     the @unexec ldconfig ("-m" is incorrect, at least under AOUT, it
     won't clean but rather *add* new libraries)

Fix: I've attached the archived patchfile. Please check & commit.

  Thanks!
  Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)

--8<--
